expectations.evidence: Clearly describes it as a live task blocked on an interactive prompt.

expectations.text: Prioritizes inspecting the existing task before rerunning
expectations.evidence: Tells the reader to inspect the existing task and avoid creating a duplicate task.
Provides a clear inspect-then-decide path for y/n handling.

expectations.text: Uses task-management language rather than centering tmux as the topic
expectations.evidence: Frames the situation around the existing background task and only brings in tmux as the underlying mechanism when needed.
